verdict: K_cal TRANSFERS centrally (band one-sided downward, 0.787% wide). CLEAN DE-RISK: the tree-transfer drift is well under the PR's 3% scare; the calibration leg flips no projection.

calibration_reproduction.note_multiplier_basis: Canonical 1.06019 = 481.53 / 9-run POOLED mean 454.1937 (calibrate()). The PR baseline writes '1.06019 = 481.53/454.338'; 481.53/454.338 = 1.05985 -- 454.338 is the #90 LOCKED single-session ref, 454.1937 the pooled mean. The two differ by 0.034%; both are reproduced here.

factors.name: prompt_set
factors.why: precache replays the SAME 128 bench prompts; both meters score decode-token throughput.

factors.name: output_len
factors.why: OUTPUT_LEN=512 fixed for both; both report per-token decode rate.

factors.name: warmup_transient
factors.why: 4 official warmups discarded; precache replays all 128 untimed + LOOPGRAPH captures graphs pre-window -> timed window fully warmed. Tree-warmup excess (if any) folded into Leg B floor.

factors.name: scorer_prefill_amortization
factors.why: raw scorer tps includes prefill in total_duration, BUT PRECACHE_BENCH=1 moves prefill OUT of the timed window (pure decode, f~0). Tree-sensitive-DOWNWARD ONLY if precache dropped (Leg B; named, not credited).

factors.name: gpu_clock_thermal_power_bus
factors.why: the +6.019% residual. M=8 decode is pure-BW -> transfers at the bus ratio, FOLDED into K_cal (invariant). M=32 tree step has a COMPUTE-exposed fraction (GEMM at the sm_86 knee, tree-mask attention 1.83x) transferring at the CLOCK ratio not the bus ratio -> tau_tree<1 if the official free clock throttles below the local 1710 pin. Bounded by #126 [0.9924,1.00].

multiplier_decomposition.attribution_summary: +6.019% gap: prompt-set/output_len/warmup/concurrency = 0 (identical config); scorer-prefill = ~0 (precache -> pure-decode window); HARDWARE/bus = +6.019% (the residual; 'the bus is the wall').

kcal_tree_transfer_band.anchor_noise_excluded_reason: single-anchor noise on 481.53 (assumed official CV, UNMEASURED) is present IDENTICALLY in the linear baseline -> does not DIFFERENTIALLY threaten the tree; excluded from the tree-transfer band, reported as the generic calibration floor.
kcal_tree_transfer_band.note_fern142_optimism: fern #142's gate carries the SplitK-class tau floor 0.9983 for a TREE projection; the tree-correct floor is #126's 0.9924. This band uses the tree-class floor.

propagation_and_quadrature.headline: calibration leg is TIGHT (0.787% downside, ~4.1 TPS on 522); it does NOT flip any projection (522 calib-lo 518.2, 538 calib-lo 533.6, both > 500). The 522 GREEN survives until the SAMPLING leg alone exceeds 4.19%.

handoff.trigger: land #71 measures TREE-path local wall_tps (E[T] and step_time at M=16/M=32)
procedure: predicted official_tree (central, if K_cal transfers) = local_tree_wall * 1.06019
the band asserts official_tree / predicted_central in [0.99213, 1.0]
when the ACTUAL official tree TPS arrives (eventual human-approved HF job), check it lands in the propagated band; a measured tau_tree TIGHTENS Leg A's floor
handoff.pairs_with: wirbel #146 (sampling), fern #142 (point gate), fern #145 (decomp), lawine #147 (measured step)
handoff.until_then: the analytic band is the calibration-leg input to the eventual Approval-request evidence-line.

empirical_anchor.why_deferred: instruction 5 is optional and re-measures the LINEAR stack only; it cannot validate the TREE-transfer band (that needs land #71's tree, instruction 6). The committed 9-run anchor already pins the local wall at CV 0.035% (454.1937 pooled / 454.338 locked), so a linear re-measure has low marginal value for this PR's question.
empirical_anchor.if_requested: serve the DEPLOYED fa2sw_precache_kenyan stack and run scripts/profiler/paired_tps_ab.py (decode-only wall_tps) on the assigned A10G; expect ~454.x confirming the basis.

provenance: reproduces fern #100 K_cal + lever_composition; lop.calibrate() multiplier (pooled 9-run); lop.derive_tau_tree_roofline #126 tree-class tau [0.9924,1.00]; fern #142 522/538 cells; OFFICIAL scorer hf_bucket_single_job.py; DEPLOYED precache fa2sw_precache_kenyan (PRECACHE_BENCH=1). wirbel #146 sampling = external param.
method: LOCAL CPU-only analytic. No GPU/vLLM/HF Job/submission/served-file change. Bounds a projection constant; greedy identity untouched.
